description: Precomputed MS-LRC evidence examples for the lightweight online demo. Values are representative artifact evidence and avoid loading transformer models at web startup.

examples.label: Human Written
examples.interpretation: The response curve improves gradually rather than collapsing at larger model scales. The short input also illustrates why detector confidence should be treated cautiously.

examples.label: AI Generated
examples.interpretation: The larger evaluator models assign lower normalized NLL, producing a steeper ladder response associated with generic generated-style text.

examples.label: Uncertain
examples.interpretation: The DTD probability falls inside the routing band, so the full local pipeline would inspect MS-LRC evidence before treating the result as actionable.
